summary: One implementation bug and one material test gap remain in the viewport-selector slice.

findings.title: Tablet/mobile widths are not actually fixed to 820px/390px because the iframe border increases the rendered box size
findings.recommendation: Add `box-sizing: border-box` to the tablet/mobile iframe rule, or move the decorative border to a wrapper, so the rendered iframe box stays exactly 820px and 390px wide as required.

findings.title: The E2E spec does not prove the desktop mode is fluid; a broken fixed-width desktop implementation would still pass
findings.recommendation: Assert desktop width against the viewport/container width, not just `> 600`. Also strengthen the post-toggle desktop assertion similarly, so a stale 820px layout cannot pass as 'fluid'.
